recommendations.title: The Art of Racing in the Rain
recommendations.overview: A family dog – with a near-human soul and a philosopher's mind – evaluates his life through the lessons learned by his human owner, a race-car driver.

recommendations.title: Goodbye Christopher Robin
recommendations.overview: The behind the scenes story of the life of A.A. Milne and the creation of the Winnie the Pooh stories inspired by his son Christopher Robin.

recommendations.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
recommendations.overview: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the south of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa. Meanwhile, a Hollywood director seeks to film his latest production at Downton.

recommendations.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale

recommendations.title: My Week with Marilyn

recommendations.title: The Lives of Others

recommendations.title: The Book Thief
recommendations.overview: While subjected to the horrors of WWII Germany, young Liesel finds solace by stealing books and sharing them with others. Under the stairs in her home, a Jewish refugee is being sheltered by her adoptive parents.

recommendations.title: The Lion King
recommendations.overview: Simba idolizes his father, King Mufasa, and takes to heart his own royal destiny. But not everyone in the kingdom celebrates the new cub's arrival. Scar, Mufasa's brother—and former heir to the throne—has plans of his own. The battle for Pride Rock i

recommendations.title: When I'm Young
recommendations.overview: 70-year-old Malena gets a second chance at life when she magically turns into her 22-year-old self. Now, posing as "Maria" to hide her true identity, she becomes the lead singer of her grandson's band and tries to recover her dream of singing, which

recommendations.title: Lipstick Under My Burkha
recommendations.overview: Four ordinary women, inflicted by silly societal norms, have to steal, lie, cheat and hide in order to lead the lives that they rightfully deserve.
